steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: The question asks which equation has the same solution, i.e., which equation is equivalent to $4x = 12$.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.content:
• '$4x=108$': Gives $x = 27$, not 3. ✗
  • '$4x=24$': Gives $x = 6$, not 3. ✗
  • '$4x=12$': Gives $x = 3$, same solution as the original equation. ✓
  • '$4x=3$': Gives $x = 0.75$, not 3. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
